description: Apache Pekko Actor is the core actor-system runtime for building concurrent, distributed, resilient message-driven JVM applications in Java and Scala. It provides classic actor APIs, dispatching, supervision, routing, scheduling, event streams, configuration integration, and foundational utilities used by other Pekko modules.

Apache Pekko Actor provides the core actor-system runtime for building concurrent, distributed, resilient message-driven JVM applications in Java and Scala. It includes the classic actor APIs, dispatching, supervision, routing, scheduling, event streams, configuration integration, and foundational utilities used by other Pekko modules.
